span.p:
DELETE canary:batch:current
Messages re-delivered from PEL

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Track msg_id in
pending_msg_ids list
DO NOT XACK

span.p:
Sort by hex ascending
Deterministic leaf ordering

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Double-hash each leaf
SHA-256(event_hash)
Second-preimage prevention

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
build_tree(event_hashes)
Bottom-up SHA-256
Parent = SHA-256(left || right)

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Generate MerkleProof
per original leaf
Sibling path to root

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
INSERT inscription_pool
batch_id, merkle_root,
batch_event_count,
padded_leaf_count,
tree_depth, status='tree_built'

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
INSERT event_inscriptions
FOR EACH event:
event_hash, event_id,
merchant_id, batch_id,
leaf_index, merkle_proof_path

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Reset batch state
pending_msg_ids = []
batch_start_time = None

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Generate deterministic mocks
inscription_id = SHA-256(batch_id)[:12]
bitcoin_txid = SHA-256('tx:' + batch_id)
mock_block = 884201 + hash(batch_id) % 1000

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
UPDATE inscription_pool
SET inscription_id, bitcoin_txid,
bitcoin_block, block_explorer_url,
fee_sats=2500, status='confirmed'

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Batch ready for
OrdinalsBot submission
(requires spend gate)

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Unique constraint
Partial commit
Log + continue

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
PostgreSQL error
Rollback — NO XACK
Messages redelivered
